- [`window.newWindowDimensions`](.vscode/settings.json:7): "inherit" - New windows inherit dimensions from current window

- [`window.closeWhenEmpty`](.vscode/settings.json:10): false - Keeps window open even when empty
- [`debug.allowMultipleSessions`](.vscode/settings.json:20): true - Allows running multiple debug sessions simultaneously

- [`kilo-code.preventCompletionWithOpenTodos`](.vscode/settings.json:18): true - Prevents completion with open todos

**Editor & Preview Settings:**
- [`workbench.editor.enablePreview`](.vscode/settings.json:19): false - Disables preview editors for more stable multi-panel work

These settings should allow you to run code review and debug modes alongside your coding sessions. The key settings for multi-session support are `debug.allowMultipleSessions` and the window preservation settings.

# scripts/boot-cockpit.ps1
# FreeAgent Swarm - Single Command Boot
param(
    [switch]$NoBrowser,
    [switch]$SkipKill = $false
)

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  FREEAGENT SWARM BOOT SEQUENCE   " -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host ""

# Always run from repo root
$rootDir = Split-Path $PSScriptRoot -Parent
if (-not $rootDir) { $rootDir = $PSScriptRoot }
Set-Location $rootDir
$scriptDir = Join-Path $rootDir "scripts"

# Colors
$Cyan = "Cyan"
$Yellow = "Yellow"
$Green = "Green"
$Red = "Red"
$Gray = "Gray"

function Write-Step {
    param([string]$Message, [string]$Color = "White")
    Write-Host "[$(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')] $Message" -ForegroundColor $Color
}

function Start-NodeProcess {
    param(
        [string]$Name,
        [string]$ScriptPath,
        [string]$Args = ""
    )
    $fullPath = Join-Path $rootDir $ScriptPath
    if (Test-Path $fullPath) {
        Write-Host "  [OK] $Name" -ForegroundColor Green
        # Run as background job instead of opening new window
        Start-Job -Name $Name -ScriptBlock {
            param($ScriptPath, $RootDir, $Args)
            Set-Location $RootDir
            node $ScriptPath $Args
        } -ArgumentList $ScriptPath, $rootDir, $Args
    } else {
        Write-Host "  [WARN] $Name - $ScriptPath not found" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    }
}

# ============================================
# STEP 1: Kill Old Processes
# ============================================
Write-Step "[1/7] Killing old processes / ports..." $Yellow
if (-not $SkipKill) {
    & "$scriptDir\kill-ports.ps1"
} else {
    Write-Step "  Skipped (using -SkipKill)" $Gray
}

# ============================================
# STEP 2: Start Redis / Memurai
# ============================================
Write-Step "[2/7] Starting Redis / Memurai..." $Yellow
& "$scriptDir\start-redis.ps1"
Start-Sleep -Seconds 2

# ============================================
# STEP 3: Start Core Services
# ============================================
Write-Step "[3/7] Starting core services..." $Yellow
& "$scriptDir\start-services.ps1"

# ============================================
# STEP 4: Start Orchestrator
# ============================================
Write-Step "[4/7] Starting orchestrator..." $Yellow
Start-NodeProcess -Name "Orchestrator" -ScriptPath "orchestrator/orchestrator.js"

# ============================================
# STEP 5: Start Router Agent
# ============================================
Write-Step "[5/7] Starting router agent..." $Yellow
Start-NodeProcess -Name "RouterAgent" -ScriptPath "services/routerAgent.js"

# ============================================
# STEP 6: Start Provider Adapters
# ============================================
Write-Step "[6/7] Starting provider adapters..." $Yellow
Start-NodeProcess -Name "ClawAdapter" -ScriptPath "services/clawAdapter.js"
Start-NodeProcess -Name "KiloAgent" -ScriptPath "services/kiloAgent.js"

# ============================================
# STEP 7: Start Main Server
# ============================================
Write-Step "[7/7] Starting main server..." $Yellow
Start-NodeProcess -Name "MainServer" -ScriptPath "cockpit/server.js"

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "  Swarm online!" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Endpoints:" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  - Main Server:   http://localhost:3000" -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host "  - Cockpit UI:   http://localhost:3847" -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host "  - LM Studio:    http://localhost:1234" -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Running as background jobs - check status with Get-Job" -ForegroundColor Yellow

# Show job status
Get-Job | Format-Table -AutoSize

# Keep running and show job output periodically
try {
    while ($true) { 
        Start-Sleep -Seconds 5
        # Check for any failed jobs
        $failed = Get-Job | Where-Object { $_.State -eq 'Failed' }
        if ($failed) {
            Write-Host "`n[ERROR] Some jobs failed:" -ForegroundColor Red
            $failed | Receive-Job
        }
    }
} catch {
    Write-Host ""
    Write-Step "Shutting down..." $Yellow
    Get-Job | Stop-Job
    Get-Job | Remove-Job
    & "$scriptDir\kill-ports.ps1"
}
